reviewer: Producer: honestly split structural vs integration-deferred (no green-wash)
approver: Approver: verified pc_inc vs ifu.v:50 RTL 2026-06-09

integration_deferred.basis: standalone ifu.v has only PC state/mux/increment; the fetch-response residue datapath lives in core.v — covered at integration, NOT faked or waived here.

waivers.structural_basis: pc_inc = is_16bit ? 32'd2 : 32'd4 (ifu.v:50) — increment is only ever 2 or 4; bit[0] is constant 0 (both values even). Only bits[1,2] toggle.
waivers.stimulus_considered: both is_16bit=0/1 driven (pc_inc 2 and 4); no input can make pc_inc any other value

waivers.structural_basis: pc_inc = is_16bit ? 32'd2 : 32'd4 (ifu.v:50) — bits[31:3] are constant 0 (max value 4 = bit2); RTL-determined two-value mux.
waivers.stimulus_considered: both increment values driven; high bits are RTL constants
